items.title: Images are live
items.body: You can now attach a picture to a post. Posts still disappear on your timer.

items.title: Join our subreddit
items.body: Come hang out with us at r/EtherBoard.

items.title: Custom timers
items.body: You can choose how long your post stays up, from 1 minute to 60. When the timer runs out it's gone — no accounts, no history, nothing kept.
